# SVG Stripper

> Strip the editor bloat out of an SVG in the browser: the XML prolog and DOCTYPE, comments and metadata, Illustrator and Inkscape namespaces, default attributes, and over-precise coordinates are removed, while gradients, clip paths, masks, referenced ids, and animation are kept. A before and after preview shows the picture is unchanged. Runs entirely on the visitor's device with no uploads.

## Tool

- [SVG Stripper](https://jaydenyoonzk.github.io/svg-stripper/): the browser tool, a static page that runs entirely on the visitor's device with no accounts and no data collection

## Documentation

- [README](https://github.com/JaydenYoonZK/svg-stripper#readme): what the tool does, how the optimizer works, and its engineering notes
- [Changelog](https://github.com/JaydenYoonZK/svg-stripper/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md): dated release history

## Source

- [Repository](https://github.com/JaydenYoonZK/svg-stripper): MIT licensed source code, including the dependency-free optimizer engine
